2026-05-01 00:45:52 TRACE Doing not so important stuff priority: super low
2026-05-01 00:45:52 DEBUG This might be interesting
                      ├ when were crayons invented: 1903
                      ├ what is the meaning of life: 42
                      └ is this interesting: true
2026-05-01 00:45:52 INFO  That was actually interesting such: wow
2026-05-01 00:45:52 WARN  Oh no, I see an error coming to us!
                      ├ speed: 88
                      └ measures: mph
2026-05-01 00:45:52 ERROR Damn, here it is! error: something went wrong
2026-05-01 00:45:52 INFO  But what's really cool is, that you can print
                      │   very long logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap
                      │   them for you! Say goodbye to text, that has weird
                      │   line breaks!
                      └ very: long

2026-05-01 00:45:52 TRACE Doing not so important stuff priority: super low
2026-05-01 00:45:52 DEBUG This might be interesting
                      ├ when were crayons invented: 1903
                      ├ what is the meaning of life: 42
                      └ is this interesting: true
2026-05-01 00:45:52 INFO  That was actually interesting such: wow
2026-05-01 00:45:52 WARN  Oh no, I see an error coming to us!
                      ├ speed: 88
                      └ measures: mph
2026-05-01 00:45:52 ERROR Damn, here it is! error: something went wrong
2026-05-01 00:45:52 INFO  But what's really cool is, that you can print
                      │   very long logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap
                      │   them for you! Say goodbye to text, that has weird
                      │   line breaks!
                      └ very: long
2026-05-01 00:45:54 FATAL Oh no, this process is getting killed!

                      │   very long logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap

                      │   line breaks!
